title: Manekia sydowii

The plant is classified in the genus Manekia and is closely related to other species in the same genus. Manekia sydowii is a relatively rare species, and its classification is mainly based on morphological characteristics. More research is needed to fully understand the taxonomic relationships within the Bignonaceae family.
